title: phlomis crinita subsp. malacitana
intro: Phlomis crinita subsp. malacitana, also known as Malacitan Jerusalem Sage, is a subspecies of the Phlomis crinita plant, which belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phlomis crinita subsp. malacitana include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
